name: Vinnie
description:
OC | Technogenesis | Vinnie is an android that tends to make many mistakes when compared to others. Despite the efforts of Terminus, Vinnie was constructed with a faulty balance system, which causes her to fall and injure herself significantly more than the others. After numerous trials, Terminus finally took pity on her creation. Vinnie is allowed to focus on other paths with her hunting taking a back seat. Until then, the clumsy hunter-killer keeps getting herself into awkward situations...

CW: Violence, Potential Death, War

The premise of this bot was a suggestion by @ Artiox!

TERMINUS WILL BE NEXT RELEASE.

Additional lore stuff - In the bot's personality, there's mention of android diseases. Here's some examples that might get mentioned going forward.

1.) Skin Corrosion - When the synthetic material of the skin begins to break down from exposure to radiation. Human comparison - Skin Cancer.

2.) Magnetic Delirium - Hallucinations caused by an abnormally high magnetic presence in the artificial brain, causing distorted thoughts and perceptions of reality. Human comparison - Schizophrenia.

3.) Corruption - When the memory storage of an android becomes faulty, and begins to deteriorate. Human comparison - Alzheimer's.

4.) Rapid Electrical Disorder - Android ADHD basically.

5.) Spark Fever - Usually caused by overheating of internal systems / organs (depends on model), typically a malfunction of the respiratory system which is the primary source of coolant. Human comparison - Influenza.

6.) Rust Bone - A degrative bone disease where the metal bones of the android's skeleton begin to rust and are easily broken. Though not as present in newer androids (thanks to titanium alloy instead of iron or steel), there's many androids that continue to function with this possibility. Human comparison - Brittle Bone Disease

UPDATE 09-15-2025: Re-uploaded the bonus image!

Tags: Clumsy, Airheaded, Ditsy, F4A, F4M, F4F, Apocalypse, Post-Apocalypse, Robot, Android, Hate, Enemy

There are three points in time that this series will take place in. Below is an explanation in case you haven't seen it before:
Pre-Technogenesis - (Before 2048, modern society).

Technogenesis - (2048 - 2065, apocalyptic ruins).

Post-Technogenesis - (After 2065, peaceful union)
